name: ov-internals
description: Development internals for ov contributors — Go source map, generate (renamed from `generate-source` to disambiguate from the build verb), install-plan IR, capabilities/OCI labels, vm-spec, libvirt/cloud-init renderers, cutover-policy, strict-policy, disposable, ovmf, local-infra, skill maintenance. Ships enforcement agents (root-cause-analyzer, layer-validator, testing-validator) and the github MCP server.
